title: CAPXEL for Sales | CAPXEL
content: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceKnow Your Prospect Before the First CallDeep consumer intelligence that gives your sales team an unfair advantage.Talk to Our TeamExplore PROSPEXThe iceberg is real: most signal is hidden beneath the surface.The Sales EdgeWhat if you knew the person behind the lead?Imagine your reps knew income range, interests, family status, and purchase behavior before they ever pick up the phone. CAPXEL gives sales teams a real intelligence layer — so every conversation starts with context.White-glove deliveryCAPXEL is a white-glove data consultancy — we don't do marketing, we empower the teams who do.Products for SalesBuild lists, enrich leads, and prioritize outreach with intelligence that actually reflects reality.PROSPEXBuild exact prospect lists — filtered by real-world attributes and intent signals. Reach the right people first.Learn more INSPEXAnalyze your best customers to create true avatars — then use those insights to qualify and personalize outreach.Learn more Buyer Ambition DataKnow who's actively looking right now — refreshed on a 7-day cycle so your outreach hits while interest is hot.Learn more SPYBOXIdentify who's already engaging with your brand. Turn unknown site traffic into warm, enriched leads.Learn more Sales Use CasesFrom outbound to close, intelligence changes the conversation.Cold outreach enrichmentStop guessing. Enrich lists with income, household, interests, and purchase behavior so reps can lead with relevance.Warm lead qualificationPrioritize who's most likely to buy based on real attributes and current intent — not form fills.Closing strategy customizationTailor the pitch to the person: benefits, objections, and framing that maps to the prospect's reality.CAPXEL IntelligenceGive your reps an unfair advantageBuild lists, qualify faster, and close with personalization that feels human — not robotic.Talk to Our TeamExplore PROSPEXFAQCommon questions from sales leaders.What kind of data can you provide for sales teams?Can this integrate with our CRM?Is this only for B2C sales?Is the data sourced lawfully?
